title: Lamb Luscious Kenyan Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and juicy Kenyan-inspired dish featuring lamb loin chops, with a hint of Indian and Middle Eastern spices. Perfect for a cozy dinner with family and friends.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400°F (200°C).
Thread the lamb loin chops onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together the garam masala, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and sprinkle the spice blend over the lamb.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they're cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, mix together chopped cilantro and lemon juice for a simple sauce to serve with the kebabs.
Remove the kebabs from the grill and let them rest for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve with the lemon sauce.
